definition.name: def-spectral-idempotent
definition.definition: P = theta(2Phi-1), the Kitaev spectral idempotent of an almost-idempotent unital positive map Phi on V=B(H)_sa, restricted to B(H)_sa. Its properties (P^2=P, P(1)=1, P real-linear, delta:=||P-Phi||<=C eta, ||P||<=1+C eta, delta-positivity) are the prior VALIDATED lemma lem-P-properties (cited here as external GT-Pprops). Reference: definitions/def-spectral-idempotent.md; report sec:spectral.
